welcomeCoordinator.heading: Welcome
welcomeCoordinator.subheading: Organize report teams, assignment requests, and smooth collective work.

mission.title: Operational coordinator
mission.intro: This role helps organize collective work and keep it flowing smoothly, especially as the number of participants grows.

items.mentorInterface: Interface between junior researchers and mentors

mission.boundary: This role helps you build organizational and professional skills. You assign report teams and process join requests — you do not replace mentors or quality checkers on technical review.

rules.title: Valid team rules
rules.body: A report team must include at least one hunter and either a mentor or a quality checker. You may add more members as needed. A unique team ID is required.
